steps.title: Use the two-solution condition
steps.content: A quadratic has two distinct real solutions when the expression under the square root in the quadratic formula is positive. For $(n-24)x^2-18x+9=0$, that gives $$(-18)^2-4(n-24)(9)\gt 0.$$ Simplify: $$324-36(n-24)\gt 0$$ $$n\lt 33.$$

steps.title: Greatest integer n
steps.content: The greatest integer satisfying $n\lt 33$ is $n=32$. Therefore 32 is correct.
